## Installation

```bash
npm install sweet-subtitle
```

Framework subpath imports:

- `sweet-subtitle/react`
- `sweet-subtitle/vue`
- `sweet-subtitle/angular`

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -F sweet-subtitle typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm -F sweet-subtitle build`
- [ ] `pnpm run release:dry`
